event_date.note: Cast to DATE from the original YYYYMMDD string format

event_datetime.note: Computed from event_timestamp (or custom timestamp parameter) with timezone conversion

event_custom_timestamp.note: Derived from a custom event parameter (milliseconds converted to microseconds), falling back to event_timestamp

session_id.note: Concatenation of user_pseudo_id and the ga_session_id event parameter

user_id.note: Session-level aggregation: last non-null user_id within the session, ordered by timestamp

page_location.note: Unnested from the page_location event parameter

page.note: Parsed from the page_location event parameter into hostname, path, query, and query_params

landing_page.note: Session-level aggregation: first page struct where entrances > 0, ordered by timestamp

event_params.note: Excluded and promoted parameters are filtered out from the original array

session_params.note: Aggregated from event_params at session level: last non-null value per configured parameter

ecommerce.note: Fixes applied: transaction_id '(not set)' nullified, purchase_revenue NaN and missing-value corrections

session_first_traffic_source.note: Session-level aggregation: collected_traffic_source from the first event in the session

session_traffic_source_last_click.note: Session-level aggregation: first non-null value in the session (the field is session-scoped in the GA4 export)

user_traffic_source.note: Renamed from the GA4 export traffic_source field

row_inserted_timestamp.note: Set to current_timestamp() when the row is inserted or refreshed by the incremental pipeline

data_is_final.note: Computed from export type or day threshold since event_date

export_type.note: Determined from the GA4 export table suffix pattern
